title: Order Tracking and Auto-fulfillment
description: Implement order tracking URLs, status webhooks, and auto-fulfillment
requirements: Generate tracking URLs for each provider: CDEK, Pochta, Ozon, WB (based on tracking_number)
Webhook endpoint: POST /webhooks/delivery/{provider} to receive status updates
Celery task: poll_delivery_statuses (every 6h) — fetch status from provider APIs
Update Order.delivery_status: pending → processing → shipped → in_transit → delivered → failed
Store tracking events in OrderTrackingEvent model: order_id, provider, status, message, timestamp
Auto-fulfillment: when order is paid, call provider API to create shipment (if provider supports)
Notification: send email/push when status changes to shipped/delivered
Add tracking_url field to Order model
acceptance_criteria: Tracking URL generated for all 4 providers
Webhook updates order status in real-time
Celery task polls statuses every 6h for orders in transit
User receives notification on status change
Auto-fulfillment creates shipment via provider API (CDEK, Pochta)
